creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/platforms/#_supported_platforms> i386 is: 

- Tier 2 under 13.x and 14.x.

<https://pkg.freebsd.org/> (at <http://pkg0.fra.freebsd.org/>) contradicts the statement of support: 

- FreeBSD:13:i386 is amongst Tier 1 platforms, not under Tier 2

- FreeBSD:14:i386 is amongst Tier 1 platforms, not under Tier 2.
